caption: The video appears to be a segment from a political news program titled "Plus Politics," broadcasted by PlusTV. The host, dressed in a suit and tie, is seated in a studio with a backdrop featuring a world map and the show's logo. On the right side of the screen, there is an inset image of Olusola Oyekanmi, identified as a political analyst from Lagos, who is participating via phone. The topic being discussed is related to Bola Tinubu, with the headline "Nigeria Needs Me - Bola Tinubu" prominently displayed. The lower third of the screen provides additional information, including the channel's YouTube link and the channels on which it can be watched (DStv CH 408 and StarTimes CH 308). The overall setting suggests a serious discussion on Nigerian politics.
